description.content:
# Global Variables & Shared Scripts

## Purpose
This globals file contains:
1. **Global Variables** - Shared across all requests
2. **Helper Functions** - Reusable test assertions
3. **Data Generators** - Random data creation
4. **Logging Utilities** - Debug and trace execution

## Usage
Import this as globals in Postman:
Settings > Export > Choose this file

## Helper Functions (Use in Tests Tab)

### validateStatus(code)
Validate HTTP status code
```javascript
validateStatus(200)
```

### responseTime(maxMs)
Assert response time < maxMs
```javascript
responseTime(1000)
```

### validateContentType(expected)
Validate response content type
```javascript
validateContentType('application/json')
```

### validateJsonSchema(schema)
Validate response against JSON schema
```javascript
validateJsonSchema(userSchema)
```

### logRequest()
Log current request details
```javascript
logRequest()
```

### logResponse()
Log response body and headers
```javascript
logResponse()
```

## Data Generators (Use in Pre-request Script)

### generateRequestId()
Generate UUID for tracking
```javascript
pm.variables.set('requestId', generateRequestId())
```

### generateCorrelationId()
Generate correlation ID for tracing
```javascript
pm.variables.set('correlationId', generateCorrelationId())
```

### generateRandomEmail()
Generate unique test email
```javascript
pm.variables.set('randomEmail', generateRandomEmail())
```

### getCurrentTimestamp()
Get ISO timestamp
```javascript
pm.variables.set('timestamp', getCurrentTimestamp())
```

---

## Collection Pre-request Setup

Every request automatically inherits:
- requestId (UUID)
- correlationId (UUID)
- timestamp (ISO 8601)
- randomEmail (test@example-XXXX.com)

No manual setup needed!
